hero.headline: Build a relationship that
hero.subheadline: Zerova is your personal Relational Intelligence assistant — grounded in 40 years of science, trained on your specific dynamic.
hero.trial: 3-day free trial · No credit card required

modes.title: Three modes. One assistant.
modes.subtitle: Zerova detects what you need — or you can choose.

safeSpace.title: Safe Space
safeSpace.desc: Process difficult emotions and conflicts in a space designed to make you feel genuinely heard before offering any guidance.

coach.title: Coach
coach.desc: Learn and practice specific Gottman skills — Gentle Start-Up, accepting responsibility, turning toward — using your real situations.

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.desc: A two-minute pulse on your relationship. Builds a longitudinal picture of your dynamic over time.

science.title: Not opinions. Science.
science.subtitle: Every intervention is grounded in peer-reviewed relationship research.
science.stat1: of couples report stronger relationships after consistent Gottman practice
science.stat2: years of peer-reviewed research behind the methodology
science.stat3: scientific frameworks: Gottman Method, EFT, CBCT

cta.title: Your relationship deserves this.
cta.subtitle: Most couples wait until things are critical. The best time to build relational intelligence is before you need it urgently.

signup.subtitle: Create your account
signup.name: First name
signup.trial: 3-day free trial included · No credit card required
